title: Intersection of Two Arrays
description: Given two integer arrays nums1 and nums2, return an array of their intersection. Each element in the result must be unique and you may return the result in any order.

examples.explanation: The intersection contains only the element 2, appearing once in the result.
The intersection contains elements 4 and 9. Order doesn't matter.
No common elements between the arrays.

hints: Use a hash set to store elements from the first array.
Iterate through the second array and check if elements exist in the set.
Make sure each element appears only once in the result.
Consider sorting both arrays and using two pointers as an alternative approach.
